## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `chore` — Build / CI / dependency update
- [ ] `ci` — GitHub Actions change

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Self-reviewed my changes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Docs updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] State machine transitions are respected (no invalid states)
- [ ] Budget / rate limits checked where applicable
- [ ] All timing uses UTC
- [ ] Database migration includes updated `WovenDbContextModelSnapshot.cs`
- [ ] CI is green
